description: Returns a single unindexed Schuylkill County, Pennsylvania probate volume (image group 007936749, imageCount 15, recordSearchablePercent 0, fulltextSearchable false) — a small browse-only volume whose image count matches image-search-schuylkill-probate. Pairs with that fixture so the listed images (15) equal the volume's imageCount (15), exercising the browse-an-unindexed-volume path without a count mismatch.
